title: Create new items and subitems on Monday based on new submissions received in Jotform

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Create new items and subitems on Monday based on new submissions received in Jotform.
Automate Creation of items and subitems on Monday.com based on new submissions received in Jotform. This process may also involve attaching files within the respective Monday board items.

Step 1: Imagine someone fills out a form on JotForm. That’s the trigger!

Step 2: Instantly, an item is generated on our Monday board, like a digital headquarters where all our items reside.

Step 3: But it doesn’t stop there! We take it up a notch by creating subitems using Monday’s ‘Create SubItem’ module. Each subitem holds essential details, making project management a breeze.

Step 4: Here comes the tech wizardry! We fetch the form submitted using the ‘Get a File HTTP’ module.

Step 5: Drumroll, please! seamlessly attach this downloaded form to the item we initially created. Picture it as putting all the pieces together in one neat package!

Jotttt1251×431 31.7 KB
